cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, there are five golfers in a tournament: Amy, Eve, Mel, Mya, and Rob. Since there are five golfers, that means Eve is in 5th place. So I can note that down: Eve = 5th. Next, it says Rob finished above Mel.
